directions_tried.name: Phase 1: TTH in its natural habitat — three parallel probes
directions_tried.outcome: All three probes succeeded. Rindler verification passed (BW confirmed). Non-equilibrium shows structural TTH failure. Excited state shows state-dependent time with growing discrepancy.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Rindler wedge BW verification — lattice scalar field vacuum, modular Hamiltonian via Williamson decomposition
explorations_completed.key_finding: TTH verified in Rindler regime. Modular flow = boost (not time translation). BW profile matches within 0.1% near entangling surface.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Non-equilibrium TTH test — post-quench state of coupled oscillators, global vs local modular flow
explorations_completed.key_finding: Structural discrepancy: modular time = pre-quench time, wrong frequencies entirely. Squeezed states much closer (7.8% vs 102%).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Excited-state modular flow — one-particle excitation, state-dependent time prediction
explorations_completed.key_finding: Modular clock ticks at entanglement frequencies, not physical frequencies. Discrepancy GROWS as N^{+0.33} in continuum limit.
